_comment: Hard height filter carved by the cave system: min(height density + 3D detail, caves). Height density = 0.5*(target_height - y): solid below the biome band, air above, steep cliffs at biome borders. The terrain_detail 3D noise (surface offset = 4*noise*amp; amp 3.0 => typical +/-3, peak +/-8 blocks) is the ONLY 3D noise in this otherwise-2D heightmap terrain; it breaks the clean geometric cuboid faces into natural rugged rock. The min with titan_moon:cave/caves subtracts the cave voids.
